docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $150.00 FILED BY HIRAGA,HARRY AS TO DEFENDANT SOLIMAN,MAHER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLTFF. REQUEST FOR RESET.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HIRAGA,HARRY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SOLIMAN,MAHER PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SOLIMAN,MAHER RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT HIRAGA,HARRY $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $120.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED, STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SOLIMAN,MAHER AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HIRAGA,HARRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
